items.title: White House teases new trade action 'soon' as it works to re-create global tariff regime
items.description: U.S. Trade Representative Jamieson Greer telegraphed that the Trump administration could impose new tariffs just as other duties are set to expire.

items.title: Goldman Sachs creates private markets platform as rich investors seek the next SpaceX and Stripe
items.description: Goldman Sachs is launching a new alternative investments platform aimed at giving wealthy clients and family offices direct stakes in private companies.

items.title: Nebius stock surges nearly 19% as Nvidia discloses significant stake in neocloud
items.description: Nvidia said it would invest $2 billion into Nebius in March.

items.title: Super Micro surges 15% on new order and margin disclosure after SpaceX announcement
items.description: Many server makers are seeing faster growth as companies race to deploy artificial intelligence servers.

items.title: GM beats on earnings, raises guidance amid 'resilient' consumer, pricing
items.description: GM raised several key earnings forecasts after beating Wall Street's second-quarter expectations as its North American operations continue to drive results.

items.title: SpaceX snaps 7-day losing streak, sets earnings date that triggers first big share unlock
items.description: SpaceX's stock gained on Tuesday and looked to snap a seven-day losing streak after announcing Aug. 4 as its maiden earnings report

items.title: $100M New Jersey deli fraudster James Patten sentenced to 21 months in prison
items.description: The notorious New Jersey deli fraud case led to losses of more than $5 million for victims that included two U.S. universities.

items.title: Bets against SpaceX grow to 32% of float as Elon Musk warns short sellers won't survive
items.description: About 206 million SpaceX shares are now sold short, representing roughly 32% of the company's publicly tradable float, according to S3.

items.title: Apple prepares a new way to buy iPhones. Plus, making sense of Google's new AI models
items.description: Every weekday, the Investing Club releases the Homestretch; an actionable afternoon update just in time for the last hour of trading.

items.title: BlackRock, Carhartt, Ford and Google launch skilled trades workforce initiative
items.description: The coalition of companies aims to address a growing labor shortage by promoting careers in the skilled trades, the firms said.

items.title: Time for a crypto comeback? Traders bet that this stock will lead the way
items.description: Crypto bulls have been waiting for a rebound, and traders think this stock could lead the way.

items.title: Investing experts: Why 'just buy the market' doesn't necessarily apply to bonds
items.description: The flagship index for bond investors has some idiosyncracies bond investors should be aware of, experts say.

items.title: RFK Jr. says cyclospora outbreak is 'under control'
items.description: Health and Human Services Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. on Tuesday said that the ongoing outbreak of cyclosporiasis is "under control" despite criticism.

items.title: Tesla shares poised for biggest earnings move in a year
items.description: Shares of Elon Musk's electric vehicle company are expected to see a sharp swing after Tesla rolls out its quarterly report.

items.title: IRS chief Frank Bisignano dismisses JPMorgan spying allegations
items.description: Bisignano denied allegations The Wall Street Journal reported that he surveilled his colleagues while working at JPMorgan more than a decade ago.

items.title: Healthcare students are turning to Kalshi and betting platforms to pay for their degrees, survey shows
items.description: "These students aren't betting for fun," said Tess Michaels, CEO of Clasp.

items.title: Bessent says U.S. could sanction China over AI model 'theft'
items.description: Chinese open-weight models are gaining steam against leading offerings from American companies like OpenAI and Anthropic.

items.title: The worst dotcom bubble investing mistakes are coming for your portfolio. Avoid them
items.description: Investors can learn from the mistakes that sank stock portfolios in the early 2000s dotcom crash when many became overly concentrated in the technology sector.

items.title: Google expands Gemini lineup with cheaper models and new Mythos rival
items.description: Google is expanding Gemini with cheaper, more efficient models and a new cybersecurity offering as it tries to close product gaps and compete on cost.

items.title: GM announces new gas-powered Cadillac vehicles amid EV pullback
items.description: GM CEO Mary Barra said Tuesday the next-generation Cadillacs will include new versions of the CT5 sedan, XT5 midsize SUV and discontinued three-row XT6 SUV.
